water.name: San Diego Creek (downstream of MacArthur Blvd. bridge)

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(86) — San Diego Creek (Orange Co.)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 248824, "San Diego Creek", Stream, Orange Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":248824,"gaz_name":"San Diego Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Orange"} — geometry multipoint with vertices at Web Mercator (-13121730.775, 3981719.524) [mouth end, ~lon -117.87451, lat 33.64864] and (-13100548.542, 3980716.793) [upstream end, ~lon -117.68423, lat 33.64114], neither of which represents the MacArthur Blvd. bridge boundary that names this reach (per CCR 14 §7.40(b)(86): 'San Diego Creek (Orange Co.), downstream of the MacArthur Blvd. bridge only'). The representative point instead uses the MacArthur Boulevard bridge crossing of San Diego Creek itself (centroid of the OSM bridge ways at the Irvine/Newport Beach border, ~33.650645°N, 117.859945°W), replacing the file's previous coordinate (-117.8589, 33.6627), which was about 1.36 km northeast of the actual bridge crossing.

parameters.note: Applies only to the segment of San Diego Creek downstream of the MacArthur Blvd. bridge.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through November 30, downstream of the MacArthur Blvd. bridge only
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Nov. 30.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Open to fishing for non-salmonids only; closed to the take of trout and steelhead.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to the take of trout and steelhead; open to fishing for non-salmonids only
regulations.verbatimText: Open to fishing for non-salmonids only. Closed to the take of trout and steelhead.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
